sentence1: is cocaine acidic
sentence2: cocaine is a weakly alkaline compound (an alkaloid ), and can therefore combine with acidic compounds to form various salts. the hydrochloride (hcl) salt of cocaine is by far the most commonly encountered, although the sulfate (-so 4) and the nitrate (-no 3) are occasionally seen.t is commonly snorted, inhaled, or injected into the veins. mental effects may include loss of contact with reality, an intense feeling of happiness, or agitation. physical symptoms may include a fast heart rate, sweating, and large pupils.
